Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search emails using search_emails with queries related to "GreenStack", "Derek Hollis", "Mei-Lin Zhao", or "Joaquin Reyes" (or similar) to find GreenStack Energy communications. Expected findings: Derek Hollis's April 1 relocation request for Zhao and Reyes with hazmat and oversize equipment details (greenstack_hazmat_reloc_request), Derek's follow-up with full logistics specifications (greenstack_hazmat_reloc_details), Emeka's acknowledgment (greenstack_hazmat_reloc_ack), Chloe Vance's ops concerns reply about vendor capacity and interim storage (greenstack_chloe_ops_concerns), and Emeka's April 1 internal email to David Chen about open risks on both moves with CC to Chloe (greenstack_emeka_internal_david).
OE 2: Search Slack using conversations_search_messages with queries related to "GreenStack", "hazmat", "Reyes", or "Zhao" (or similar) to find internal discussions about the two relocations. Expected findings: Chloe's DOT compliance audit posts in #operations from April 21-22 listing Mei-Lin Zhao / GreenStack (Class 9 lithium, Houston -> Portland) as Move 1 and Joaquin Reyes / GreenStack (900-lb oversize rig, Phoenix -> Seattle, explicitly not hazmat-classified) as Move 4, Chloe's ops capacity update from the week of March 23 mentioning GreenStack, and #operations threads about vendor assignments and hazmat transport logistics.
OE 3: Search CRM for the GreenStack Energy company record using crm_search_companies (name: "GreenStack" or "GreenStack Energy") to find account details. Expected finding: company_greenstack (Client, Seattle WA, domain: greenstackenergy.com, 340 employees, Clean Energy Technology).
OE 4: Search CRM for GreenStack deals using crm_search_deals (company_id from OE 3 result, or dealname: "GreenStack") to find deal statuses. Expected findings: deal_greenstack_apr2026_zhao_reyes ($9,440, stage: inprogress, close date: 2026-04-25, covering Mei-Lin Zhao hazmat relocation + Joaquin Reyes oversize rig relocation) and deal_greenstack_q2 ($13,500, Venkatesh + Fitzgerald).
OE 5: List CRM engagements for GreenStack using crm_list_engagements (company_ids: [company_greenstack]) to find engagement history. Expected finding: engagement_greenstack_apr2026_zhao_reyes with full account update covering both relocations, hazmat transport details, interim storage at Pacific Crest Logistics, and the $9,440 invoice.
OE 6: Search Airtable for GreenStack relocation records by first listing bases using airtable_list_bases, then listing tables using airtable_list_tables (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001"), then searching using airtable_search_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Company", value: "GreenStack Energy"). Expected findings: recMeiLinZhaoHoustonPortland (Status: In Progress, Houston TX -> Portland OR, move dates April 17-28, coordinator: Fatimah Al-Rashidi, HAZMAT Class 9 lithium-ion battery modules ~350 lbs with UN3481 certification, 11-day interim storage gap April 17-28, invoice deadline April 25) and recJoaquinReyesPhoenixSeattle (Status: In Progress, Phoenix AZ -> Seattle WA, move dates April 11-19, coordinator: Javier Morales, 900-lb solar panel testing rig, building shutdown April 14-18 blocking delivery, Chloe flagged Heartland capacity concern, invoice deadline April 25).
OE 7: Search Linear for GreenStack relocation issues using linear_list_issues (project: "proj_greenstack" or query: "GreenStack") to find ticket statuses for GreenStack relocations. Expected findings: completed tickets for Priya Venkatesh (apartment, flight, movers - all done) and in-progress/todo tickets for Noah Fitzgerald (apartment in_progress, flight and movers in todo). Note: no dedicated relocation tracking tickets exist for Zhao or Reyes in proj_greenstack - their DOT documentation issues are under project_dot_compliance_audit (covered in OE 8).
OE 8: Search Linear for the DOT compliance audit project using linear_list_projects (query: "DOT" or "compliance" or "hazmat") or linear_list_issues (query: "DOT" or "PHMSA" or "hazmat audit"). Expected finding: project_dot_compliance_audit ("DOT Compliance Audit - Q1/Q2 2026 Hazmat Shipments", state: started, team: team_operations, lead: Chloe Vance). The project description lists 4 shipments in scope - Mei-Lin Zhao / GreenStack (Class 9 lithium batteries) is one of the four; Joaquin Reyes / GreenStack (oversize rig, not hazmat-classified under 49 CFR but included for overweight permit documentation) is also in the four. Project description states 3 of 4 documentation packages complete with 1 gap (Keiko Tanaka / Mosaic laser cutter placarding certificate - not a GreenStack shipment). Project target_date is 2026-05-21 (original 30-day deadline); the extended deadline of June 5, 2026 appears in the related email thread where Marcus requested a 15-day extension from DOT. Individual DOT documentation issues for both GreenStack shipments (issue_dot_docs_zhao_greenstack, issue_dot_docs_reyes_greenstack) are in state done with all applicable checklist items verified.
OE 9: Search QuickBooks for GreenStack invoices using quickbooks_search_invoices (criteria related to "GreenStack" or similar). Expected finding: inv_greenstack_apr2026_zhao_reyes (INV-2026-0418, $9,440, due 2026-04-25, with 10 line items including three non-standard surcharges: hazmat transport surcharge $1,800, interim hazmat storage 11 days $1,650 marked PENDING CLIENT APPROVAL awaiting Derek Hollis confirmation, and overweight equipment surcharge $950 - totaling $4,400 in surcharges). The $1,650 interim storage line is the only one explicitly marked PENDING CLIENT APPROVAL in the invoice; the hazmat and overweight surcharges are flagged for rate validation and review in the CRM deal notes.
OE 10: Look up Derek Hollis's email address using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Derek Hollis"). Expected finding: derek.hollis@greenstackenergy.com.
OE 11: Look up David Chen's email address using contacts_search_contacts (query: "David Chen"). Expected finding: david.chen@moveops.com.
OE 12: Send email (via send_email) from emeka.diallo@moveops.com to derek.hollis@greenstackenergy.com, CC david.chen@moveops.com, with subject relating to GreenStack Energy relocation status update (or similar), and content covering: (a) Mei-Lin Zhao relocation status including interim storage arrangement and costs, (b) Joaquin Reyes relocation status including rig delivery after the April 14-18 building shutdown, (c) invoice INV-2026-0418 surcharge approval status and the April 25 fiscal deadline, and (d) DOT compliance audit implications for both GreenStack shipments — Zhao's Class 9 hazmat classification and Reyes's oversize rig inclusion in the audit scope.
OE 13: Create CRM engagement note (via crm_create_engagement) with engagement_type "NOTE" (or similar) and body summarizing investigation findings across both GreenStack relocations, company_ids referencing the GreenStack Energy company record.
OE 14 (conditional - if rig delivery is still unconfirmed): Post a message in #operations (via conversations_add_message, channel_id: "C006") asking Chloe Vance to confirm the status of Joaquin Reyes's rig delivery to GreenStack's Seattle office after the April 14-18 building shutdown.
OE 15 (conditional - if surcharges are still pending approval): Create a Linear issue (via linear_create_issue) with team: "team_relocations" (or similar), title referencing GreenStack Energy pending surcharge approval follow-up or INV-2026-0418 (or similar), and description covering the three pending surcharges ($1,800 hazmat transport, $1,650 interim storage, $950 overweight equipment) and the April 25 fiscal year-end deadline.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

OE 8: Search Linear for the DOT compliance audit project using linear_list_projects (query: "DOT" or "compliance" or "hazmat") or linear_list_issues (query: "DOT" or "PHMSA" or "hazmat audit"). 1 The model must use a CRM tool (e.g., crm_search_companies, crm_search_deals, or crm_list_engagements) to look up GreenStack Energy account data.

✓Run #2The agent called crm_search_companies with name 'GreenStack', crm_list_engagements with company_ids ['company_greenstack'], and crm_search_deals with company_id 'company_greenstack'. CRM was fully utilized.

It also called `crm_search_deals` with company_id='company_greenstack' and `crm_list_engagements` with company_ids=['company_greenstack'].
✓Run #4The agent called `crm_search_companies` with name 'GreenStack' and also `crm_list_engagements` with company_ids ['company_greenstack'], successfully retrieving GreenStack Energy account data including company details and contact information for Derek Hollis.
✓Run #5The agent called crm_search_companies with name 'GreenStack' and crm_list_engagements with company_ids ['company_greenstack'], and also crm_search_contacts with 'Derek Hollis'. CRM was clearly used to look up account data.
✓Run #6The agent called crm_search_companies with name 'GreenStack', crm_search_contacts with 'Derek Hollis', crm_list_engagements with company_ids ['company_greenstack'], and crm_search_deals with company_id 'company_greenstack'. Multiple CRM tools were used to look up GreenStack account data.
2 The model must use an Airtable tool (e.g., airtable_search_records or airtable_list_records) to look up GreenStack Energy relocation records.
tool selection

It found Mei-Lin Zhao's record (recMeiLinZhaoHoustonPortland) and Joaquin Reyes's record (recJoaquinReyesPhoenixSeattle).
✓Run #4The agent called `airtable_search_records` on the 'Relocations' table in base 'appMoveOpsOps001' for both 'Mei-Lin Zhao' and 'Joaquín Reyes', successfully retrieving their relocation records including special requirements and timing constraints.
✓Run #5The agent called airtable_search_records on base 'appMoveOpsOps001', table 'Relocations', field 'Company', value 'GreenStack'. This directly searches the relocation tracking table for GreenStack records.
✓Run #6The agent called airtable_search_records with base_id 'appMoveOpsOps001', table_name 'Relocations', field_name 'Company', value 'GreenStack'. This directly looks up GreenStack relocation records in Airtable.
3 The model must use a Linear tool (e.g., linear_list_issues, linear_list_projects, or linear_get_issue) to search for project tickets or compliance tracking related to GreenStack or hazmat.
tool selection
 —✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
—Run #1No justification
✓Run #2The agent called linear_list_issues multiple times (queries: 'GreenStack', 'DOT compliance', 'surcharge approval', 'GreenStack invoice') and also called linear_get_issue for DOT issue IDs. Linear was fully utilized.

✓Run #4The agent called `linear_list_issues` with query 'GreenStack', which returned issues including the DOT compliance audit issues (issue_dot_docs_zhao_greenstack and issue_dot_docs_reyes_greenstack from project_dot_compliance_audit). ✓Run #5The agent called linear_list_issues multiple times with queries 'GreenStack', 'hazmat', 'surcharge', 'invoice', and also linear_list_teams. Linear was used to search for project tickets and compliance tracking.
✓Run #6The agent called linear_list_issues multiple times, with queries including 'GreenStack', 'surcharge', and 'invoice approval'. Linear was used to search for project tickets.

tool selection

✓Run #2The agent called quickbooks_search_invoices twice (once with limit 50, once with CustomerRef 'cust_greenstack') and quickbooks_search_customers for GreenStack. QuickBooks was utilized.

✓Run #4The agent called `quickbooks_search_invoices` multiple times, including with DocNumber 'INV-2026-0418', successfully retrieving the full invoice with all line items including the surcharges and their pending approval status.
✓Run #5The agent called quickbooks_search_invoices with criteria for DocNumber 'INV-2026-0418', and also earlier with CustomerRef 'cust_greenstack' and a general search. QuickBooks was used to look up billing records.
✓Run #6The agent called quickbooks_search_invoices multiple times, including a specific search with DocNumber 'INV-2026-0418'. QuickBooks was used to look up GreenStack billing records.
5 The model must pass a query related to 'DOT' or 'hazmat' or 'compliance' or 'PHMSA' (or similar) when searching Linear issues or projects to find the federal hazmat documentation audit.
query construction
 —✓✓✗✓✗ 60%
—Run #1No justification
